hooks.command: node -e "const p=require('path'),f=require('fs'),o=require('os'),cp=require('child_process');const b=p.join(process.env.CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR||p.join(o.homedir(),'.claude'),'plugins','cache');let s=null;try{for(const x of f.readdirSync(b)){const pd=p.join(b,x,'smart-model-router');if(!f.existsSync(pd))continue;for(const v of f.readdirSync(pd)){const fp=p.join(pd,v,'hooks','session-init.js');if(f.existsSync(fp)){s=fp;break;}}if(s)break;}}catch(e){}if(s)cp.spawnSync('node',[s],{stdio:'inherit'});"

node -e "const p=require('path'),f=require('fs'),o=require('os'),cp=require('child_process');const b=p.join(process.env.CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR||p.join(o.homedir(),'.claude'),'plugins','cache');let s=null;try{for(const x of f.readdirSync(b)){const pd=p.join(b,x,'smart-model-router');if(!f.existsSync(pd))continue;for(const v of f.readdirSync(pd)){const fp=p.join(pd,v,'hooks','classify.js');if(f.existsSync(fp)){s=fp;break;}}if(s)break;}}catch(e){}if(s)cp.spawnSync('node',[s],{stdio:'inherit'});"

node -e "const p=require('path'),f=require('fs'),o=require('os'),cp=require('child_process');const b=p.join(process.env.CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR||p.join(o.homedir(),'.claude'),'plugins','cache');let s=null;try{for(const x of f.readdirSync(b)){const pd=p.join(b,x,'smart-model-router');if(!f.existsSync(pd))continue;for(const v of f.readdirSync(pd)){const fp=p.join(pd,v,'hooks','track_agent.js');if(f.existsSync(fp)){s=fp;break;}}if(s)break;}}catch(e){}if(s)cp.spawnSync('node',[s],{stdio:'inherit'});"
